title: artemisia campestris subsp. bottnica
intro: Artemisia campestris subsp. bottnica, also known as field wormwood, is a subspecies of the Artemisia campestris plant, a perennial herb native to Northern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of field wormwood may include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial effects. Field wormwood can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil for its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
